caption: An older woman with grey hair and glasses, wearing a red short-sleeved button-down shirt, is seated at a desk in an office setting. She is positioned in front of a window with a view of green foliage and next to a tall, light-colored metal filing cabinet topped with stacks of notebooks. On the desk in front of her are a laptop, various papers, and a folder. As the video progresses, she speaks and gesticulates with her hands to emphasize her points. In the initial frames, her hands are held close to her chest, but by the final frame, she has extended her left arm outward with an open palm. Her facial expression remains engaged and communicative throughout the sequence, while the background elements and her seated position remain static.
